title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: OCHOCO LAKE SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space (no lifeguard on duty). 11700 NE Ochoco Highway Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: April-October dawn to dusk Email (541) 447-1209 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-1209 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OCHOCO LAKE
